hooks.command: REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -f "$REPO/Makefile" ] && cd "$REPO" && make db-start --no-print-directory -s 2>/dev/null || true
REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -f "$REPO/local_resources/skilllog/skill_logger.py" ] && cd "$REPO" && uv run python "$REPO/local_resources/skilllog/skill_logger.py" || true
